text.title: Risk Threshold Policy — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of `risk-threshold-policy.yaml`. PM tooling (router script, register UI) reads this file as source of truth.

forbidden.pattern: band entry without target_name (only role) — r2 violation
band entry without sla_hours — r3 violation
co_signatures missing sponsor signature — r5 violation
next_refresh_date is more than cadence_weeks past — policy is stale
two bands overlap on score range

allowed-transformations.transformation: Reduce sla_hours after demonstrated reliability — e.g. amber from 24h to 12h.
Swap target_name when a person leaves; requires update + co-sign within 14 days.
Add a black band above red for catastrophic risks; requires full re-co-sign.

list.item: All bands have target_name (not just role)
De-escalation criteria written for each band
Sponsor + delivery lead + PMO signatures present and dated within refresh cadence
Channels listed match the team's actually-monitored channels
